title: Audience
subtitle: Who listens to you, where, and how they discover you.

segments.title: Fan segments
segments.subtitle: Fanbase segmented by engagement intensity — 30-day trend

superfans.label: Superfans
superfans.desc: Stream every release on day one, buy merch and tickets.

engaged.label: Engaged
engaged.desc: Come back every week, follow playlists and socials.

casual.label: Casual
casual.desc: Discovered via playlists and radio — the pool to convert.

dormant.label: Dormant
dormant.desc: Past listeners with no recent plays — prime re-engagement target.

demo.title: Demographics
demo.subtitle: Modeled estimate derived from listening data

discovery.title: Discovery sources
discovery.subtitle: How listeners find their way to your music

algorithmic.label: Algorithmic
algorithmic.desc: Radio, daily mixes, automatic DSP suggestions. Fueled by your completion and save rates.

editorial.label: Editorial
editorial.desc: Platform editorial playlists. Earned through pitching ahead of every release.

playlists.label: Listener playlists
playlists.desc: Playlists built by fans and independent curators. A strong signal of organic loyalty.

ugc.label: UGC & socials
ugc.desc: TikTok, Reels, Shorts. Volatile, but the top discovery engine under 25.

roster.title: Roster audiences
roster.subtitle: Fanbase comparison — click an artist to zoom in
